# WCAG Quick Reference For Manual UI Audits

Use this as a manual review aid, not as automated compliance evidence.

- Text contrast appears sufficient for normal and small text.
- UI can be operated by keyboard for the primary workflow.
- Focus is visible.
- Form controls have labels.
- Error messages identify the field and recovery action.
- Headings and landmarks support navigation.
- Motion does not block use and respects reduced motion where applicable.
- Images that convey meaning need alternatives.
